sms.body: Hi this is Sarah Johnson I was referred to you by Mike at First National Bank
Hi Sarah welcome! Mike mentioned you are looking to buy in the Riverside area. When would you like to start looking
Yes we are looking for 3bed 2bath under 450K. This weekend works if you are available
Saturday 10am works great. I will pull some listings and send them over tonight
Good morning Sarah! Ready for today? First stop is 123 Oak Lane at 10:30
On our way! Can my husband come
Of course! See you both there
We loved 123 Oak Lane! The kitchen was exactly what we wanted. What do you think about the price
Its priced well for the area. Comps show 415-435K range. The listing is at 425K which is fair. Want to make an offer
Yes lets do it! What do you suggest for the offer price
Great news Sarah! Seller accepted our offer at 418K with closing in 45 days
OMG thats amazing!! Thank you so much! What happens next
Next steps: 1) earnest money deposit due by Friday 2) home inspection next week 3) appraisal will be ordered. I will coordinate everything
Earnest money wire sent this morning. Can you confirm it was received
Confirmed! Escrow has the earnest money. Inspection scheduled for Tuesday at 2pm
Inspection report is in. Overall the house is in great shape. Minor items: roof flashing needs repair and one GFCI outlet not working
Is the roof thing a big deal
Not major. Maybe 2-3K to fix. I recommend we ask the seller to credit us at closing. Ill draft the repair request
Seller agreed to a 2500 credit for repairs. Appraisal is scheduled for Thursday
Perfect thank you for handling all of this
Appraisal came in at 420K which is above our purchase price of 418K. We are good to go!
Wonderful! When is closing
Closing is set for March 15th at 10am at Pacific Title. I will send the settlement statement a few days before
Final walkthrough tomorrow at 9am. Then closing at 10am. Dont forget to bring your ID and certified check
We will be there! So excited
Congratulations Sarah and family! You are officially homeowners! Here are your keys
Thank you for everything! You made this so easy. We will definitely refer you to our friends
Hi Mike its me. I have a new client Sarah Johnson looking to buy around 450K. Can you get her pre-approved
Sure thing! Have her call me at the office or I can send her the online application link
Send her the link please. Her number is 555-123-4567
Pre-approval letter for Sarah Johnson is ready. Approved up to 460K. Ill email it over
Great thanks Mike. Can you also send the rate lock details
Rate locked at 6.25 percent for 60 days. Conventional 30yr fixed with 10 percent down
Mike we got an accepted offer at 418K. Can you start the full underwriting
Congrats! Starting underwriting today. Will need the purchase agreement and earnest money receipt
Underwriting is clear to close! Final loan docs being sent to title today
Awesome thanks Mike. Closing is March 15th at Pacific Title
Hi Janet opening escrow for 123 Oak Lane. Buyer Sarah Johnson seller Tom Williams. Purchase price 418K
Got it! Escrow number is 2026-04521. Ill send the preliminary title report by end of week
Title search complete for 123 Oak Lane. Clean title no liens or encumbrances. Report emailed
Perfect. Can we schedule closing for March 15th
March 15th at 10am works. Ill send the settlement statement by March 12th
Settlement statement for 123 Oak Lane is ready. Emailing to all parties now. Buyer needs certified check for 45,230
Thanks Janet. Forwarding to my client now
Closing complete! Documents recorded. Keys released to buyer. Great working with you
Hi Tom can you do an inspection at 123 Oak Lane next Tuesday at 2pm
Tuesday 2pm works. Is this a standard home inspection
Yes standard plus termite. Buyer will be there
Inspection for 123 Oak Lane done. Found minor issues - roof flashing needs repair and one GFCI outlet. Full report coming tonight
How urgent is the roof issue. Deal breaker or negotiation point
Negotiation point. Estimate around 2-3K to fix. Everything else looks good. Termite clear
Hi we spoke at the open house last Sunday. We are thinking about selling our home on Cedar Ave
Hi David! Great to hear from you. I would love to do a market analysis. When can I come see the property
How about Wednesday evening around 6
Wednesday at 6 works. I will bring the comps for your neighborhood. See you then
David based on the CMA I recommend listing at 385K. The market is strong right now for your area
That sounds good. When can we go live
Photographer is coming Thursday. We can go live on MLS Friday morning
We got 3 showing requests for this weekend! The listing is getting great traffic
Awesome! Do we need to leave the house for showings
Yes best to leave for 30 min each showing. Saturday at 11am 1pm and 3pm
We received two offers on Cedar Ave! One at 380K and one at 390K. Want to review them tonight
Yes please. Can you come over at 7
David the 390K buyer accepted our counter at 385K with 30 day close. Congratulations!
Great news! Thank you for negotiating that. What are next steps
Buyer inspection went well. Only minor items. Appraisal came in at 388K which is above sale price. We are on track
Closing for Cedar Ave is next Wednesday at 2pm at Pacific Title. Bring your ID
Closing complete! Proceeds will wire to your account within 24-48 hours. Congrats David
Thank you! Maria and I really appreciate everything you did. Will leave you a great review
Hi my clients want to see your listing at 222 Elm St. Any availability this week
Sure! Wednesday or Thursday afternoon works. What time
Wednesday 3pm
Confirmed. Lockbox code is 4589. Please leave feedback after showing
My clients loved the property! They want to make an offer. Sending it over this afternoon
Great! I will present it to my sellers tonight
Hey do you have any other listings coming up? My buyers are still looking for a 4bed in Riverside
Actually I might have a pocket listing next month. 4bed 3bath on Maple. Ill keep you posted
Karen the Maple property is going live next week. Want a preview showing for your clients
Absolutely! When can we see it
How about Friday at noon
Friday noon works. Thanks for the heads up!
Earnest money received for 123 Oak Lane. Escrow officially opened. Number 2026-04521
Thanks Lisa. Timeline for the appraisal
Appraiser is scheduled for next Monday. Should have results by Wednesday
Quick update on 123 Oak Lane - all contingencies have been removed. We are in the clear for closing
Great news. Settlement statement ready yet
Will have it by end of next week
Lisa do you also have capacity to handle the Cedar Ave closing? Same buyer agent
Yes! Send me the purchase agreement and I will get it set up
Both closings recorded today! 123 Oak Lane and Cedar Ave all done. Keys released
Thank you Lisa great working with you as always
Reminder: office meeting tomorrow at 9am. New compliance requirements for transaction files
Thanks Jim I will be there
Your transaction file for 123 Oak Lane needs the updated lead paint disclosure. Please upload by Friday
Will do. I have the signed copy just need to scan it
Great job on the Oak Lane and Cedar Ave closings! Two in one month is solid
Thank you Jim! Got a few more in the pipeline
Annual license renewal reminder. Due by April 30th. CE hours complete?
Yes all done. I will submit the renewal this week
Hi I saw your sign on the Maple property. Is it still available
Hi! Yes the Maple property is available. It goes live on MLS next week. Would you like a private showing
Yes please! Is it 4 bedrooms
4bed 3bath 2200 sqft. Updated kitchen and new roof last year. Are you pre-approved for a mortgage
Not yet but we have been talking to our bank
I recommend getting pre-approved first. I can refer you to a great lender if you need one. In the meantime I can show you the property Saturday
Saturday works! 2pm?
Saturday 2pm confirmed. I will meet you at 789 Maple Dr. See you then!
We loved the house! Can you send us the lender contact? We want to get pre-approved and make an offer
Thats great to hear! I will text you Mike's info. He is fantastic and can usually get pre-approval in 48 hours
